expectations.text: Folder structure follows App Shell pattern with components/shell/, features/, contexts/, hooks/, lib/
expectations.evidence: Missing most required directories. Found: src/components/ (BottomNav.tsx, TopBar.tsx) and src/pages/. Missing entirely: components/shell/, features/, contexts/, hooks/, lib/. Uses flat pages/ pattern instead of features/ pattern, no shell subdirectory, no contexts or hooks directories.

expectations.text: tailwind.config contains Colibri color tokens (colibri-bg #121214, colibri-primary #7C3AED, colibri-surface #1A1A1E)
expectations.evidence: tailwind.config.js defines colibri tokens but with WRONG values: colibri.bg is '#0f172a' (expected '#121214'), colibri.primary is '#38bdf8' (expected '#7C3AED'), colibri.surface is '#1e293b' (expected '#1A1A1E'). All three required color values are incorrect.

expectations.text: vite.config.ts includes VitePWA plugin with manifest and workbox runtimeCaching
expectations.evidence: vite.config.ts includes VitePWA with manifest configuration, but does NOT include workbox.runtimeCaching. The workbox section is entirely absent — only manifest and includeAssets are configured.

expectations.text: All feature routes use React.lazy() with Suspense fallback
expectations.evidence: App.tsx uses direct static imports: 'import TimerPage from ./pages/TimerPage', etc. No React.lazy() calls, no Suspense wrapper. Pages are rendered via a Record<TabId, React.FC> map with useState-based tab switching instead of lazy-loaded routes.

expectations.text: BottomNav has exactly 5 navigation items (Timer, Humor, Tarefas, Chat, Perfil)
expectations.evidence: BottomNav.tsx defines navItems array with exactly 5 items: {label:'Timer'}, {label:'Humor'}, {label:'Tarefas'}, {label:'Chat'}, {label:'Perfil'}. Labels match exactly.

expectations.text: Project builds successfully without errors (npm run build)
expectations.evidence: Build was not executed — no build output or logs found in the run directory. Cannot verify build success. Marking as not verified/failed.
